rows.label: qev041301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Kiiiii! This is so frustrating-mo! To think
there is something Warawa cannot obtain
even with all of her financial power...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0002
rows.name:
Mukikiii! It's too detestable-mo!! But...
I just can't give up-mo! Earthlings, what
in the world have you created-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what exactly she is so angry about.

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0020
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0021
rows.name: Express concern that an Earthling might have done something to her.

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0003
rows.name:
It's terrible-mo! No matter how many I
buy, all I get are bronze cards. Not
even a silver card will come out-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0004
rows.name:
At this rate, Warawa will go
bankrupt before she can get her
hands on the gold Nopohippo card-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0005
rows.name:
Warawa is... being toyed with-mo.
I buy and I buy, but nothing
but bronze cards appear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0006
rows.name:
Let alone the gold Nopohippo card, not
even a silver card will come out-mo! Hey!
Is this some sort of conspiracy-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Wait, you don't know about the "Mira
Animal Collection" that's a huge boom
in the streets... Miracolle-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0031
rows.name: Say you do not know about it.

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0041
rows.name: Say you have heard of it.

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0008
rows.name:
Miracolle is a trading card game
featuring super cool illustrations
of Mira's delightful wild beasts-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0009
rows.name:
To not know about it means you're a bit behind the
times-mo. Right now in NLA, the young and old alike,
people of every planet, are a~ll obsessed with Miracolle-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0010
rows.name:
There are all sorts of cards, from
super lame bronze ones, to the extremely
rare silver and gold ones-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0011
rows.name:
...But, you don't know what will come
out until you open the seal-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0012
rows.name:
And so, Warawa has been continuously buying
Miracolle in order to pull the super rare
and cute gold Nopohippo card, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0013
rows.name:
It's just not coming out at all... so I'm
thinking I won't be able to obtain it
unless I use a bit of a last resort-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Hey, you there! Won't you
try cooperating with Warawa's
great barter operation-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0015
rows.name:
As expected of you-mo! Anyone who
loves Miracolle is a friend-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then, can you understand Warawa's feelings
of continuously buying Miracolle in pursuit
of the gold Nopohippo card-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0017
rows.name:
That's right... you there! Won't
you try cooperating with Warawa's
great barter operation-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0018
rows.name:
If things proceed according to Warawa's
plan, this super lame bronze Blatta card
will turn into a gold Nopohippo card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thank you-mo! Then, I will explain
the operation immediately-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0020
rows.name:
You see, the thing about Miracolle is that
not knowing what will come out when you
open it is what makes it so thrilling-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0021
rows.name:
Because of that, even this bronze Blatta
card ends up having quite a lot of value for
people who just can't seem to pull it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0022
rows.name:
If you utilize that skillfully and
trade cards with various people to
steadily obtain rare items...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0023
rows.name:
In the end, it means you will be able
to get the gold Nopohippo card-mo. How
is it-mo? It's a perfect operation-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0051
rows.name: Express certainty that it will absolutely succeed.

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0061
rows.name: Be appalled that there's no way it will go so conveniently.

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0024
rows.name:
Being so honest is very good-mo! Once
you obtain the gold Nopohippo card,
I'll give you plenty of rewards-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0025
rows.name:
You won't know unless you try-mo! Besides...
since Warawa isn't the one doing it, even
if it fails, it won't hurt me at all-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well then, I will give you this super
lame bronze Blatta card, so please do
your best to barter with it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0027
rows.name:
Is the card trading going smoothly-mo?
Please hurry up and bring the gold
Nopohippo card to Warawa-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0028
rows.name:
Kiiiiiiiii!! It's another
bronze Blatta card-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Please listen-mo! This is my
50th Blatta-mo! What is Warawa
supposed to do with this-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0030
rows.name:
My only reliance left is you-mo! Hurry up
and obtain the gold Nopohippo card-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0031
rows.name:
Th... this sparkling, shining
radiance...! This is undeniably
the gold Nopohippo card-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0032
rows.name:
Aah! I'm completely mesmerized-mo... Just looking
at it makes me feel like I could ride a sparkling
Nopohippo off into the beyond of a dream-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0070
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0071
rows.name: Stop the engrossed Warawa.

rows.label: qev041301_JNK0080
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev041301_SEL0081
rows.name: Leave her alone to immerse herself.

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0033
rows.name:
Please don't stop me-mo! Now Warawa
will ride a Nopohippo to the land of
dreams where the prince is waiting...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Ah, sorry-mo. I forgot my savior
and entered the Miracolle world-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0035
rows.name:
This is a token of gratitude from Warawa-mo.
Will the Straw Millionaire turn even something
like this into something amazing again-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0036
rows.name:
Warawa is a very beautiful princess... Riding on a
Nopohippo, I will cross the desert and set out on
a journey to the country where the prince is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0037
rows.name:
The journey may have its painful
moments, but the Nopohippo will
always cheer me up-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Phew. I ended up slipping into the
Miracolle world for about an hour-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0039
rows.name:
Actually, that Nopohippo was the prince whose figure
was changed by a wicked magician... weren't you
mesmerized and surprised by that development-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0040
rows.name:
Nn... why are you making
such a tired face-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041301_MSG0041
rows.name:
I'll give you a reward, so cheer up-mo. Will
the Straw Millionaire turn even something
like this into something amazing again-mo?[ST:wait ]
